calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph Carson, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Petitioner DeMarco Hopkins was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Victor Jhamil Holly, Jr., who was not present at today's hearing.

Petitioner were placed under oath and testified.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Victor Maurice Hopkins.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Reset To Jun-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
